sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 프리포트 맥모란은 2025년 4분기 4억 600만 달러의 순이익을 기록하며 구리 및 금 판매량이 예상치를 상회했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 4분기 순이익은 4억 600만 달러(주당 0.28달러), 조정 순이익은 6억 8,800만 달러(주당 0.47달러)를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 인도네시아 그라스버그 블록 케이브 지하 광산의 단계적 재가동을 2026년 2분기부터 시작할 예정입니다.
2025년 연간 총 45억 달러의 자본 지출을 집행했으며, 2026년에는 주요 광산 프로젝트에 30억 달러를 포함해 총 43억 달러를 투자할 계획입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 4분기 구리 판매량은 7억 900만 파운드, 연간 총 판매량은 36억 파운드를 기록했습니다.
2025년 말 기준 연결 부채는 94억 달러, 현금 및 현금성 자산은 38억 달러를 보유하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 구리 34억 파운드, 금 80만 온스 생산 목표 달성 여부와 그라스버그 광산 재가동 진행 상황을 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a4q2025exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Freeport Reports Fourth-Quarter and Year Ended 2025 Results • Fourth-quarter 2025 operating results: ◦ Consolidated copper and gold sales higher than October 2025 estimates ◦ Consolidated average unit net cash costs favorable to October 2025 estimates • Activities on track to commence a phased restart beginning in second-quarter 2026 of the Grasberg Block Cave underground mine in Indonesia • Progressing organic copper growth projects • Strong financial position and favorable long-term outlook • Net income attributable to common stock in fourth-quarter 2025 totaled $406 million, $0.28 per share, and adjusted net income attributable to common stock totaled $688 million, $0.47 per share. • Consolidated production totaled 640 million pounds of copp  Normalized numeric aliases: $406 million = 4억 600만 달러; $688 million = 6억 8,800만 달러; 640 million = 6억 4,000만 달러; 25 million = 2,500만 달러; $406 = 406달러; $0.28 = 0.28달러; $688 = 688달러; $0.47 = 0.47달러.

4 billion pounds of copper, 1.0 million ounces of gold and 92 million pounds of molybdenum for the year 2025. • Consolidated sales totaled 709 million pounds of copper, 80 thousand ounces of gold and 22 million pounds of molybdenum in fourth-quarter 2025, and 3.6 billion pounds of copper, 1.1 million ounces of gold and 83 million pounds of molybdenum for the year 2025. • Consolidated sales are expected to approximate 3.4 billion pounds of copper, 0.8 million ounces of gold and 90 million pounds of molybdenum for the year 2026, including 640 million pounds of copper, 60 thousand ounces of gold and 22 million pounds of molybd  Normalized numeric aliases: 4 billion = 40억 달러; 1.0 million = 100만 달러; 92 million = 9,200만 달러; 709 million = 7억 900만 달러; 22 million = 2,200만 달러; 3.6 billion = 36억 달러; 1.1 million = 110만 달러; 83 million = 8,300만 달러; 0.8 million = 80만 달러; $23.77 = 23.77달러; 3,423 million = 34억 2,300만 달러; $4.75 = 4.75달러; $3,423 = 3,423달러; $22.63 = 22.63달러; 4,078 million = 40억 7,800만 달러.

l expenditures totaled $1.0 billion, including $0.6 billion for major mining projects in fourth-quarter 2025, and $4.5 billion, including $2.3 billion for major mining projects and $0.6 billion for PT Freeport Indonesia’s (PTFI) smelter and precious metals refinery (collectively, PTFI’s downstream processing facilities), for the year 2025. Capital expenditures are expected to approximate $4.3 billion, including $3.0 billion for major mining projects, for the year 2026. • At December 31, 2025, consolidated debt totaled $9.4 billion and consolidated cash and cash equivalents totaled $3.8 billion.
